entity.label: Luz
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: A place in the land of the Hittites, founded (Judg. 1:26) by “a man who came forth out of the city of Luz.” It is identified with Luweiziyeh, 4 miles north-west of Banias.

nodes.label: Luz
nodes.description: A place in the land of the Hittites, founded (Judg. 1:26) by “a man who came forth out of the city of Luz.” It is identified with Luweiziyeh, 4 miles north-west of Banias.

verses.text: And the man went into the land of the Hittites, and built a city, and called the name thereof Luz: which is the name thereof unto this day.
